---
title: "New State-Specific Resources"
author: "Ryan Zomorrodi"
date: "2025-03-07"
categories: [News]
---

We have added state specific resources for Alaska, California, Nebraska, New Jersey, Virginia, and Vermont for some Hawaii-specific data resources.

If you have any suggestions or notice any updates that need to be made, please feel free to contact Ryan Zomorrodi ([rzomor2\@uic.edu](mailto:rzomor2@uic.edu)).

Best, The CEHI Training Team
